steps.t: The farmer whose lands were looted can be found west of Langhold, not far from the north gate. You should speak with the farmer and hear out the story…
Eastmund's Lair is along the western edge of the northern Wold.
The foes amassed near Langhold appear to be very organized. You should seek the leader of this rabble and encourage him to return with his unruly foll…
Eastmund has asked for a message of grievances to be brought to Thane Utred of Langhold. You should go to Thane Utred at once and deliver the message,…
Cíllan stands near the Thane in the Mead Hall of Langhold. You should show Cíllan the letter.
Utred is in the Mead Hall in Langhold. You should speak with Thane Utred now that Cíllan has said her piece.
